title: Magical Canadian Pancakes
description: A delicious and fluffy pancake recipe with a magical twist, featuring Canadian flavors.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the pancake mix, magical powder, and shredded cheese.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and softened creamy butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the preheated pan or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
